title: JS Green Ancient Debris Ore
description: This resource pack replaces the texture of the Ancient Debris block with a fully green version.
body:
# JS Green Ancient Debris Ore

A simple texture pack that turns the ore Block you wish completely green. No other changes made. Perfect for much better visibility and compatible with all Minecraft versions.

---

## Connect

Feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/VzVJ3zCaJY) if you need help or just want to hang out with the community.

> JS Gaming is part of [HMLabs](https://hmlabs.eu).
